name: Dak's Rye Oat Bran Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Better for Bread white flour
4 tbsp Gluten (optional for a lighter, higher loaf. Add 3 tbsp Extra water if you add the Gluten)
2 Egg whites or 1 egg or 1/4 Egg substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the breadmaker's browning control to light.
2. Add all ingredients into the pan in the order listed, select "Oat/French" setting, and push "Start."
